content: The original Self-Refine framework for code generation can be upgraded by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervision while resolving the common limitation of single-perspective blind spots in vanilla Self-Refine. This hybrid framework leverages conflicting feedback from different self-generated problem-solving perspectives to drive more robust, generalizable refinement of both code and open-ended reasoning outputs.
